patch:
commit edcdc81e2bb39ff8bf6c326c24f4b70e9eebea3d
Author: Siyuan Zhu <timeorange7071@outlook.com>
Date:   Thu May 4 16:59:07 2023 +0200

    [ValueTracking] add UGT/UGE and SGT/SGE in `isImpliedCondOperands`
    
    Partially `fix` https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/62441.
    
    Extend isImpliedCondOperands() to handle ugt/uge and sgt/sge predicates.
    
    alive2 proof: https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/jLFDAv and
    https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/Z8idUd
    
    Differential Revision: https://reviews.llvm.org/D149510

diff --git a/llvm/lib/Analysis/ValueTracking.cpp b/llvm/lib/Analysis/ValueTracking.cpp
index ec05fa99b1b3..1a15ad4bb6aa 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Analysis/ValueTracking.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Analysis/ValueTracking.cpp
@@ -8144,12 +8144,26 @@ isImpliedCondOperands(CmpInst::Predicate Pred, const Value *ALHS,
       return true;
     return std::nullopt;
 
+  case CmpInst::ICMP_SGT:
+  case CmpInst::ICMP_SGE:
+    if (isTruePredicate(CmpInst::ICMP_SLE, ALHS, BLHS, DL, Depth) &&
+        isTruePredicate(CmpInst::ICMP_SLE, BRHS, ARHS, DL, Depth))
+      return true;
+    return std::nullopt;
+
   case CmpInst::ICMP_ULT:
   case CmpInst::ICMP_ULE:
     if (isTruePredicate(CmpInst::ICMP_ULE, BLHS, ALHS, DL, Depth) &&
         isTruePredicate(CmpInst::ICMP_ULE, ARHS, BRHS, DL, Depth))
       return true;
     return std::nullopt;
+
+  case CmpInst::ICMP_UGT:
+  case CmpInst::ICMP_UGE:
+    if (isTruePredicate(CmpInst::ICMP_ULE, ALHS, BLHS, DL, Depth) &&
+        isTruePredicate(CmpInst::ICMP_ULE, BRHS, ARHS, DL, Depth))
+      return true;
+    return std::nullopt;
   }
 }

tests.test_body:
define i1 @test_sge_icmp(i32 %length.i, i32 %i) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @test_sge_icmp(
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 true
  %iplus1 = add nsw i32 %i, 1
  %var29 = icmp sge i32 %length.i, %i
  %var30 = icmp sge i32 %length.i, %iplus1
  %res = icmp ule i1 %var30, %var29
  ret i1 %res
}
tests.source_program:
define i1 @test_sge_icmp(i32 %length.i, i32 %i) {
  %iplus1 = add nsw i32 %i, 1
  %var29 = icmp sge i32 %length.i, %i
  %var30 = icmp sge i32 %length.i, %iplus1
  %res = icmp ule i1 %var30, %var29
  ret i1 %res
}
tests.current_optimized_program:
define i1 @test_sge_icmp(i32 %length.i, i32 %i) {
  %iplus1 = add nsw i32 %i, 1
  %var29 = icmp sge i32 %length.i, %i
  %var30 = icmp sge i32 %length.i, %iplus1
  %res = icmp ule i1 %var30, %var29
  ret i1 %res
}

issue.title: LLVM fails to remove bounds check if value is guaranteed to be less than value smaller than length.
issue.author: AngelicosPhosphoros

comments.author: floatshadow
comments.body:
I think it is similar to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/61393 @nikic.
When the pass pipeline reaches `isImpliedCondICmps` (in simplifyICmpInst), the full case will find LHS and RHS shared the operands and do the fold, but the half case will not.

`isTruePredicate` , `isImpliedCondOperands`, `isImpliedCondICmps`  seem leave out some cases, I'll fix it.

comments.author: caojoshua
comments.body:
Fixed by https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/commit/cb9f1aaddac0ce6bf9386309e33e104ba3f9359c. See https://godbolt.org/z/jaocbn83K.

Note that the patch only can eliminate the bounds check when dividing by a power of 2. If dividing by 3 or some unknown, we still can't remove the bounds checks. See the same godbolt link above for an example. I'll create a separate patch for that.
